source_jobs.title: Senior QA Engineer - Contractor role
source_jobs.description:
About the Role

We are seeking a Senior QA Engineer who not only brings strong technical expertise in test automation and quality assurance but also excels in communication, collaboration, and balancing priorities. This is a fast-paced team, and success in the role requires the ability to understand complex technical systems quickly, communicate effectively, and partner closely with senior and principal engineers.The ideal candidate has hands-on experience in API testing, UI testing, and automation frameworks (Playwright preferred), but equally important is their ability to adapt under pressure, prioritize in a dynamic environment, and contribute to a culture of quality and teamwork.



Your Responsibilities

 - Quality Ownership: Drive testing efforts across web applications, APIs, and integrations, ensuring releases meet high standards.

 - Test Automation: Design, implement, and maintain automated test scripts with Playwright (and other tools where appropriate).

 - API Testing: Develop and execute tests for RESTful and GraphQL APIs, including validation of data integrity and error handling.

 - UI Testing: Validate front-end workflows and user experiences with attention to detail and usability.

 - Communication & Collaboration:
   
   - Clearly document test cases, results, and defects in a way that’s easy to understand.
   
   - Partner closely with senior and principal engineers, product managers, and stakeholders to align on requirements and priorities.
   
   - Present findings and risks with confidence in meetings, adapting communication style depending on the audience.

 - Prioritization: Balance competing demands and deadlines, ensuring critical paths are tested without losing sight of long-term quality goals.

 - Mentorship & Support: Share knowledge with junior QAs, contribute to process improvements, and foster cross-functional collaboration.



Your Profile

 - 5+ years of experience in Quality Assurance, with at least 2 years in automation.

 - Strong experience with Playwright (or Selenium/Cypress, with willingness to transition).

 - Proven track record of API testing (Postman, REST Assured, or similar).

 - Solid understanding of test planning, execution, and defect lifecycle.

 - Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to bridge technical and non-technical discussions.

 - Strong time management and ability to juggle multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

 - Proven ability to understand complex technical systems and contribute meaningfully to technical discussions.

 - Collaborative mindset with a proactive approach to problem-solving.

 - Ability to work independently while fostering teamwork across distributed teams.

 - Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies and CI/CD pipelines is a plus.

source_jobs.title: QA Automation Engineer (Mobile)
source_jobs.description:
About the Role

As QA Automation Engineer for mobile applications, you are going to play a crucial role by interacting with our squads and with the product team as well to ensure that our features meet our qualitative and quantitative standards. You are going to write tests on your own but also train the members of our development teams to have a much better perspective on quality assurance whilst developing and will serve as a steward in terms of quality for the Websites team. 



Your Responsibilities:

 - Lead QA efforts for mobile-first SaaS solutions, working closely with engineering and product teams to ensure quality, performance, and reliability across iOS and Android applications.

 - Develop, maintain, and scale a comprehensive mobile automation framework that supports native, hybrid, and cross-platform apps (including Flutter).

 - Oversee the full lifecycle of automated mobile test cases—design, implementation, execution, reporting, and continuous optimization—following best practices and structured methodologies.

 - Select and implement mobile testing tools (e.g., Appium, Espresso, XCUITest, Flutter Driver), and manage cloud-based device testing platforms such as BrowserStack and Sauce Labs for real-device and cross-platform coverage.

 - Collaborate with product stakeholders to define mobile-focused test strategies, acceptance criteria, and feature validation aligned with sprint goals.

 - Support and manage app submission workflows to the Google Play Console and Apple App Store Connect, ensuring compliance and release readiness.

 - Continuously evolve QA processes to streamline mobile testing and accelerate feedback loops in Agile/Scrum environments.



Your Profile:

 - Excellent communication skills in English, with the ability to bridge gaps between technical teams and business stakeholders.

 - 5+ years of experience in test automation, with a strong emphasis on mobile application testing (native and cross-platform).

 - Hands-on expertise with mobile testing frameworks and tools, including Appium, Espresso, XCUITest, Flutter Driver, and integration_test for Flutter apps.

 - Proficient in using BrowserStack, Sauce Labs, Firebase Test Lab, and other cloud-based device labs to execute tests at scale.

 - Familiarity with mobile app submission processes via the Google Play Console and App Store Connect, including pre-launch reports and release monitoring.

 - Experience with complementary tools such as Postman, Charles Proxy, JMeter, Firebase Performance Monitoring, Jira, Jenkins/GitLab CI, and Git.

 - Proven ability to define, execute, and continuously improve mobile testing strategies in fast-paced, iterative development environments.

 - A collaborative and proactive team member who enjoys mentoring others and promoting a quality-first culture across teams.

source_jobs.title: Technical Operations Specialist
source_jobs.description:
As Technical Operation Specialist, we are the link between the operational side and product development. Through working in close contact with Product Managers and Engineering teams, we are able to provide guidance to client-facing teams on technical matters and current product developments.

We advise them on client inquiries and revise current workflows for optimal resolution and efficiency.

Our exceedingly comprehensive knowledge of the product and product related systems enables us to identify workflow gaps and to integrate improvements.

Our proposals are based on analyzed data and by envisioning an ideal process and outcomes.

By focusing on relevant information, we are able to transfer knowledge effectively and in a clear and digestible way - internally and externally. Any additional coding skills (HTML, JS, CSS, etc.) facilitate the fulfillment of our responsibilities.




Your responsibilities

 - Executing API calls as well as performing SQL queries in order to investigate root causes are integral tasks of our day-to-day business.

 - Provide operational expertise for internal and external projects on feasibility and capacity in accordance with current resources and offered service

 - Gain specific knowledge on current and past product developments to give guidance for client-facing teams and maintain strong cross-functional relationships

 - Revise current processes and workflows, analyze service related data to propose improvements and adjustments to optimize operational efficiency

 - Assist internal stakeholders in ticket escalations by triaging reported client bugs, creating individual database reports and performing technical tasks

 - Partner with Product & Engineering to have top notch knowledge about current product developments

 - Identify and provide creative solutions for challenges that are outside of the regular service process and ensure long-term resolutions while delivering top tier service to every customer interaction

 - Offer appropriate solutions and/or explanations towards clients (written or verbal form) in a de-escalating manner that are in the interest of both parties





Your profile

 - You have relevant professional experience at a B2B software company in relation to a product requiring explanation, preferably in the areas of online marketing, e-commerce or IT

 - You are very analytical, tech-savvy, have very good Excel skills and API knowledge

 - You can quickly familiarize yourself with new and technically complex issues, prioritize them and organize yourself

 - You work in a very structured, independent manner and prioritize current challenges cool-headedly

 - You are familiar with a constantly changing environment and a fast implementation of new solutions

 - You are open for new ideas and approaches, you have excellent communication skills, both written and verbal

 - You understand our clients’ needs and offer a truly service-oriented support without leaving the company goals behind

 - You are a natural coordinator who has a strong sense of big-picture objectives and a sharp eye for detail

 - You are curious and have an intrinsic motivation to learn new things and are eager to present gathered knowledge

 - You have an academic degree or equivalent vocational training

 - You are fluent in English

source_jobs.title: Technical Support Specialist (French speaking) - remote possible
source_jobs.description:
We're looking to expand our Technical Support team to work remotely from Spain and provide first-technical level support for our French-speaking customers. This role requires fluent French language skills.



Your Responsibilities:

 - You will manage the ongoing technical relationship with your assigned customers once the Implementation is finished, focusing on KPIs like retention and customer satisfaction.

 - You are able to handle escalated support cases from the Customer Support team that require closer attention either in relation to client engagement or technical understanding.

 - If necessary, you will be responsible for describing and escalating bugs through the appropriate internal channels (e.g. Jira)

 - You collaborate closely with your colleagues in the wider Customer Organisation including Customer Success, Customer Support, Sales, etc.

 - You are very familiar with our processes and support the rest of the Global Technical Service team in their efforts to constantly develop and improve these internally and externally you work on individual projects and documentation to be used internally and externally



Your Profile:

 - BA/BS degree (optional)

 - Relevant professional experience at a B2B software company in relation to a product requiring explanation, preferably in the areas of digital marketing, e-commerce, or IT

 - Experience in technical account management, increasing customer satisfaction, and reducing customer churn through technical solutions

 - You are motivated by finding great solutions for our customers and you will be able to offer a truly service-oriented approach

 - You can quickly familiarize yourself with new and technically complex issues, prioritize them and organize yourself

 - Ideally, you already worked with ticket and CRM systems in the past (e.g. Jira, Salesforce)

 - You can find your way around Excel if necessary, especially when it comes to large data sets

 - You have experience working in an international team

 - You speak English & French

 - You are open to new ideas and approaches, you have excellent oral and written communication skills

 - You can work independently and are comfortable working remotely



Nice to Have:

 - You have basic MySQL skills and can write/update queries

 - You have  an understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript and can troubleshoot browser errors

 - You have previous experience using APIs 

 - You have worked with and can navigate Postman

 - You have a basic understanding of location management on networks such as Google and Facebook 



What we offer:

 

💜 A mission with meaning and purpose At Uberall, we foster genuine connections between local businesses and people. Our diverse team allows us to win together with our partners, co-workers, and customers. Speaking of our customers, they’re some of the most recognizable businesses in the world.

 

😁 A truly human culture We’re famous for our culture. Uberallers live by our values. We’re open, collaborative risk-takers with a whole lot of passion and grit.

 

🤸🏽‍♀️ Flexibility to fit your lifestyle Want to come to an office for collaboration? We’ve got space for you in Berlin, Amsterdam, and Barcelona. We also offer co-working access in Montreal, Paris, London, LA and San Diego. Prefer to work remotely? Fine by us! Bonus points if we meet your pets in a video call. If working from another country is legally possible for you and within a reasonable time zone, we happily support work-ations.

 

💸  A piece of the pie Our pay & perks are competitive, and you better believe we review them on the regular to make sure they stay that way. We grow together, so of course all Uberallers are part of our long-term incentive program through VSOP/ESOP.

 

♺ Emotional and intellectual connection Events and alignment sessions - YES and YES. With the team, cross-functions, regional, you name it - we love bringing people together. Uberallers share a LOT of hobbies. Whatever you’re into – reading books, ba

source_jobs.title: Account Executive - Bilingual German/English speaker - fully remote
source_jobs.description:
Help us bring people and businesses together

Our SaaS platform enables multi-location brands and businesses to boost their online presence in a rapidly evolving world. From big to small, from Adidas to ZenPark, our client base contains some of your favourite brands as well, we bet.  

 

The Past, Present & Future

 

The Past: Founded in 2013 by David Federhen and Florian Hübner, two longtime friends with a vision to improve customer experience across the online and offline worlds, they created a platform that connected companies with local customers in the digital-first moment. 

 

The Present: We're on a mission to put every single business on the map, and believe every business deserves success, regardless of size or location. Simply put, our location marketing platform exists to help our customers get found online and connect with customers through search, discovery, engagement and conversion. 

 

The Future: We're a growing company with a bright future. We have established ourselves as a rising thought leader through the introduction of Location Performance Optimization (LPO). Our AI strategy is gaining momentum and it's setting us apart in the market.  Our agentic AI 'UB-I' moves us from features and functions to business outcomes. UB-I will work 24/7 to optimize location performance, driving engagement, visibility and, most importantly, measurable results.  As AI changes search far beyond traditional SEO results, we are at the forefront of enabling our customers to reach theirs in this new era. We have a passionate and diverse team, a comprehensive, intuitive platform and a clear vision for the future. We're looking for talented, passionate people, with an AI-first mindset, (like you 👋) to join us on our journey.

 

You and us

 

We are more than 400 Uberallers, with 50+ different nationalities in 30+ countries, who live and breathe our core values: 

 

🌵 GROW TOGETHER  

⛰ DEMONSTRATE PASSION & PERFORMANCE  

✊ BE BOLD & DRIVE CHANGE 

🚀 BE CUSTOMER OBSESSED

 

So, what are you waiting for? If you're passionate, driven, customer obsessed and ready to be bold, we want you on our team! Apply now and let's grow together.

 

Uberall is seeking an accomplished bilingual German/English-speaking Account Executive to further strengthen our market-leading presence in the DACH region.

 

As an experienced sales professional with a proven track record in selling SaaS solutions, you will play a key role in accelerating our growth by building on our strong foundation and expanding our reach within the region.

 

You will take a consultative approach to sales, leveraging your polished presentation skills to engage new customers and drive meaningful business impact. Your primary focus will be on driving incremental growth in monthly recurring revenue and acquiring new logos, all while ensuring an outstanding customer experience.

 

The ideal candidate is a strategic thinker with a passion for sales, eager to take on new challenges and make a lasting impact in a high-growth environment.

 

If you’re passionate, driven, and ready to be bold, we want you on our team! Apply now and let’s grow together.



Your Responsibilities

 - Develop and nurture relationships within accounts in your territory

 - Lead an mid-market engagement process that is based on MEDDPICC (MEDDIC) and champion-based selling to mid-market organizations.

 - Manage complex sales cycles, an adaptation of tendering processes and major responsibility in extensive contract negotiations with users, influencers and decision-makers at the CxO management level 

 - Exceed monthly/quarterly sales targets by driving new opportunities and selling mid-market 

 - Platform solutions that align with the customer’s product needs and business priorities.

 - Generate short-term results whilst maintaining a long-term perspective to improve overall revenue generation

 - Partner  with Sales Development /Solution Engineering and Customer Success assigned to your territo

source_jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer - Contractor
source_jobs.description:
About the Role

We are looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer with expertise in React to help us build and enhance our next-generation web applications. As part of our collaborative team, you’ll create seamless, responsive, and visually compelling user interfaces that drive exceptional customer experiences. You’ll work closely with our product, design, and backend teams to deliver impactful features on a global scale.



Key Responsibilities

 - Develop and maintain responsive, high-performance web applications using React.

 - Collaborate with product managers and UX/UI designers to transform concepts into intuitive, user-friendly interfaces.

 - Write clean, maintainable, and scalable code, adhering to best practices in frontend development.

 - Optimize applications for maximum speed and performance across various devices and platforms.

 - Troubleshoot, debug and resolve frontend issues to ensure a smooth user experience.

 - Work with backend engineers to integrate frontend components with our microservices architecture.

 - Actively participate in code reviews, offering and receiving feedback to improve code quality.

 - Stay current with the latest trends and advancements in frontend technologies and contribute to continuous improvement.

 - You will champion the growth of junior engineers by providing dedicated mentorship, fostering a supportive learning environment, and actively guiding their technical development through code reviews and pairing sessions.



Your Profile

 - 5+ years of experience as a frontend engineer with strong proficiency in React.

 - Solid understanding of JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5, and CSS3.

 - Strong understanding of responsive web design and cross-browser compatibility.

 - Experience working with RESTful APIs and integrating frontend with backend services.

 - Experience with testing frameworks (e.g., Jest, React Testing Library).

 - Familiarity with modern frontend build tools (e.g., Webpack, Babel) and version control (Git).

 - Understanding of accessibility standards and best practices (WCAG).

 - Experience with frontend performance optimization techniques.

 - Experience working in Agile environments, preferably in a Scrum team.



Nice to Have

 - Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps tools.

source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative (BDR)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

Most big brands are surprisingly invisible where it matters most: locally. At Uberall, we help giants like Adidas and KFC turn online searches into real-world foot traffic. With our new UB-I AI tech, we've moved past just "selling SEO" — we're delivering actual business results. We're on a mission to put every business on the map, and we need people who get why that matters.

This isn't a "smile and dial" floor. In our North American Enterprise team, you're a Strategic Player. You'll be hunting big accounts, mapping out messy organizations, and acting as a consultant to Marketing leaders. You aren't just filling a calendar. You're building a business.

This is also a launchpad, not a holding pattern. We won't keep you a BDR forever: we'll give you the training and runway to move into AE, AM, or leadership roles as the team grows.




YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Smart Prospecting: Dig into a company's local presence, find the gaps they didn't know they had, and show them exactly what they're missing. No email blasts.

 - The Multi-Channel Play: Use a mix of cold calling, personalized video, and LinkedIn. Know how to "interrupt the pattern" to get a busy CMO to actually stop and listen.

 - AI as your Co-Pilot: Leverage AI tools (Gemini, Claude) to handle the grunt work (research, personalization, outreach) so you can spend more time on high-level strategy.

 - The AE Partnership: Act like the CEO of your territory. Partner with multiple Account Executives to crack "whale" accounts and make sure every meeting you set is primed to close.

 - CRM Discipline: Keep Salesforce, Gong, and LinkedIn Sales Navigator tight. If it's not in the CRM, it didn't happen.
   
   


YOUR PROFILE

 - You've got grit: A track record of hitting targets because you simply refuse to lose. You like to win, and you hate being #2.

 - You're curious: The person who actually asks "why?" You want to understand a business's problems before you try to fix them.

 - You speak human: You can take a complex tech concept and explain it so simply that a prospect immediately gets the value.

 - You're a student of the game: You love the craft of sales. Open to real-time feedback, you like role-playing, and you're always sharpening your pitch.

 - The Basics: Comfortable in Salesforce, Gong, and LinkedIn Sales Navigator.

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer - AI Platform & Frameworks
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a senior engineer to help shape and lead the platform that other engineering teams build on top of. Our mission is to make AI agents and high-throughput backend systems easy for internal teams to adopt, and you'll own significant parts of how that platform is designed: the reusable libraries, Spring Boot starters, templates, and supporting tooling that the whole company depends on.



You'll work across two worlds:

 - Agentic frameworks: the libraries, starters, and orchestration patterns that internal teams use to ship LLM-powered agents (Python/LangChain/LangGraph on the agent side, Kotlin/Spring Boot on the platform side), plus the supporting frameworks (evaluations, guardrails) that prove those agents actually work.

 - Core backend platform: Kotlin services and libraries and the shared building blocks other teams depend on.



This is a high-leverage, builder-and-multiplier role. You'll make foundational design decisions, set the patterns and standards other engineers follow, and raise the bar for everyone building on the platform. Because the foundations you create sit underneath many teams' work, understanding how the company fits together, its products, domains, and the teams behind them is central to doing it well. While AI development experience is a great plus, we are looking for someone with genuine enthusiasm for the field, someone ready to dive deep into agentic systems and become our go-to expert.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Own the design of shared libraries, Spring Boot starters, and templates while making the architecture, API, and trade-off decisions that determine how easily internal teams ship on top of them.

 - Set the patterns and standards for our agentic frameworks, agent orchestration, tool use, memory, and the surrounding plumbing (message routing, human-in-the-loop workflows, MCP integration), and bring teams along with them.

 - Mentor and upskill product teams in Python-based AI agent development, including hands-on guidance with the LangChain and LangGraph frameworks.

 - Lead the evaluation and guardrail strategy so we can measure agent quality, reliability, and regressions.

 - Drive technical work across our Kotlin/Spring Boot platform and the client libraries that wrap it.

 - Build and maintain a clear map of the wider ecosystem (how our systems, domains, and teams connect) and use it to make foundational decisions that fit real needs across the company.

 - Drive adoption and multiply other engineers. Mentor teammates, review designs and code, run the docs/examples that turn a good framework into one that teams actually choose, and feed what you learn back into the platform.

 - Set the research direction in unfamiliar territory: identify where to invest, prototype the promising approaches, and turn the winners into production-ready foundations the rest of the org can rely on.

 - Raise the bar on developer experience, clear APIs, good defaults, useful errors, and documentation people actually read, and hold the platform to it.
   


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 7+ years of professional software engineering experience, including a track record of building libraries, frameworks, or platform components that other engineers built on.

 - Deep experience with Kotlin / the JVM and Spring Boot, and strong instincts for API and library design. You know what makes a foundation pleasant to build on versus painful.

 - Demonstrated technical leadership: you set direction, make and justify architectural trade-offs, and lift the engineers around you, with or without formal authority.

 - Genuine drive to lead on agentic AI and its surrounding tooling (frameworks, evaluation, guardrails, orchestration), and to become a go-to expert for the org.

 - The judgment to drive ambiguity to clarity: to take an open-ended or unfamiliar problem and turn it into a sound, well-scoped design others can execute.

 - A systems thinker who owns the bigger picture: you actively understand ho

source_jobs.title: Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

As Product Manager for Listings, you will own one of the most critical domains at Uberall. Our core mission is to bridge the gap between businesses and their customers by ensuring their digital presence is accurate, consistent, and optimised across the globe. You will be responsible for managing and evolving 60+ integrations with global platforms like Google, Apple, Facebook, and Bing — and for keeping that ecosystem healthy as partner requirements, data standards, and market expectations continue to evolve.

This is a high-impact role where your work directly influences the success of thousands of brands. You will navigate the complexity of a mature SaaS platform, lead the full product lifecycle from deep technical discovery to global rollout, and report to the Group Product Manager for Listings & Locations with real ownership over your domain.




YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

 - End-to-end product ownership. Lead the entire product lifecycle for the Listings domain — defining the product vision, and executing a roadmap with a focus on long-term scalability rather than quick fixes.

 - Integration strategy and API management. Manage the health and expansion of our 60+ partner integrations. You will dive into API documentation, test endpoints, and ensure our data pipelines are robust and compliant with partner requirements.

 - Customer-centric discovery. Act as the voice of the customer. Conduct regular interviews, lead feedback sessions, and run concept tests with key clients to validate that your roadmap solves real-world challenges.

 - Agile execution. Own the backlog and prioritisation process. Translate complex requirements into clear user stories and work closely with engineering to manage sprints and navigate technical trade-offs.

 - Data-driven decision making. Define and track success through rigorous metrics. Monitor product health, adoption rates, and integration performance — and use those insights to justify prioritisation and report progress to stakeholders.

 - AI integration. Leverage AI tools daily to optimise your workflow, and explore AI-driven features within the Listings product to automate data mapping, improve matching accuracy, and enhance the user experience.

 - Global collaboration. Coordinate effectively with cross-functional teams across EMEA, LATAM, and North America in a remote-first environment.




YOUR PROFILE

 - 5+ years of product management experience in a B2B SaaS environment, with meaningful depth in a core product area — you've stayed long enough to see the long-term impact of your decisions.

 - Strong technical foundation. You are highly proficient in API logic and testing. While you won't be writing code, you can hold your own in deep technical discussions with engineers, and understand how systems break under real-world conditions. A background as a Technical PM, Business Analyst or Engineer is highly preferred.

 - Clear, effective communication. You know how to ask the right questions, simplify complex technical topics for different audiences, and stay concise in a remote work environment. Strong English is required.

 - Analytical rigour. You understand how product decisions move the needle on KPIs like churn, NRR, and adoption — and you use data to defend your priorities, not just describe them.

 - AI fluency. You don't just know about AI — you use it. You apply AI tools to your daily workflow and ideally have experience thinking through AI-enhanced product features.

 - Research and discovery skills. Beyond customer calls, you are skilled in competitive analysis, market trend monitoring, and data mining to identify the next opportunity for our Listings ecosystem.

source_jobs.title: VP of Product & Market Strategy
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE


We are looking for a senior product leader to act as the external and internal voice of our product strategy. This role sits at the intersection of Product, Sales, and Market, translating customer needs into compelling narratives and shaping how our innovation is understood, adopted, and monetized.
You will serve as a proxy for the CTO and VP of Product in the field, representing our roadmap, vision, and technical differentiation with credibility and authority.
This is not a traditional product management role. It is a high-impact, externally-facing leadership position focused on market influence, strategic deals, and aligning product direction with real-world customer needs.
This is an individual contributor role. You will not manage a team.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Together with Product Marketing, work on defining and continuously refining how we communicate our product vision, roadmap, and differentiation

 - Translate complex technical capabilities into clear, compelling business value

 - Ensure consistency across Sales, Marketing, and Product messaging

 - Represent the company at conferences, executive briefings, and industry events

 - Act as a senior spokesperson for product innovation and strategy

 - Support strategic enterprise deals with credibility and depth

 - Partner with Sales and Solutions teams on high-impact opportunities

 - Shape solution narratives that align product capabilities with customer pain points

 - Influence deal strategy where product direction and roadmap are critical

 - Bring structured, high-quality market feedback into Product and R&D

 - Identify emerging trends, gaps, and opportunities to help prioritize roadmap decisions based on real customer insight

 - Act as the bridge between Product, GTM teams, and Leadership

 - Collaborate with Product Marketing to enable Sales and Solutions with clear, differentiated product storytelling

 - Elevate the overall sophistication of how we position and sell the product



YOUR PROFILE

 - 10+ years in Product, Solutions, or Technical GTM roles in B2B SaaS

 - MarTech background strongly preferred, ideally in location marketing, search, reputation management, CDP, customer engagement, or adjacent categories

 - Proven ability to operate credibly with both technical and business stakeholders

 - Strong executive presence and public speaking experience

 - Deep understanding of how products are built, positioned, and sold

 - Experience influencing product direction without direct ownership

 - Ability to simplify complex ideas without losing substance

 - Familiarity with AI tools and applied AI in B2B SaaS is a plus, as innovation in this space is central to our product direction

 - Located in the Americas and willing to travel for events and key customer engagements

notes: Mixed tech and non-tech roles, with a focus on AI and software engineering. No explicit mention of sponsorship or clearance requirements.
